title: Build your first Android app in AI Studio in 5 minutes
summary: Google Cloud Tech tutorial demonstrating how to build a native Android photography app in five minutes using Google AI Studio and Gemini 3.5 Flash for prompting and app prototyping. Covers sideloading, testing, and bug fixes.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through building a native Android photography app in five minutes using Google AI Studio, with Gemini 3.5 Flash handling the prompting and app prototyping. It covers the full loop from prompt to running app: sideloading the build onto a device, testing it, and fixing bugs. The takeaway is a concrete demonstration of rapid prototyping and code generation, showing how prompt engineering drives the app's structure and how iteration resolves errors after the first pass.
